text: As I stand in this modern, quiet space, I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and clean geometry suggest order and clarity, but the tilted perspective unsettles me. When I turn to the vibrant, information-rich R+D wall, I am drawn into a world of possibility—research, innovation, and connection. I sense the tension between sterile formality and creative potential. It feels as though I am poised at the threshold of discovery, urged onward by an environment that asks me to think, question, and create meaning from my surroundings.
